root: ^Noelle: All my friends always say they want to be Tuna anglers. Why do they say it's so fun?
^Sam: Well, I think everyone just says that because Tuna brings in the big bucks. Sushi shops, Poke restaurants, even fine dining - everyone wants a good Tuna for their dishes.
^Sam: Oh, very. They'll fight you forever, sometimes hours, before you can reel them in. Takes a real endurance battle to pull it off.
^Sam: Honestly, I don't know. Someone was holding spacebar the whole time.
